title: Smoky Crumbly Goose Fat Crumble
description: This indulgent Malaysian dish features a low-sodium friendly version of goose fat crumble with a smoky twist and a tadka seasoning to bring out its flavors.

ingredients.name: Tadka Seasoning Blend (Optional)
ingredients.notes: Contains mustard seeds, cumin seeds, nigella seeds, and other spices for the smoky flavor

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the goose fat with low-sodium chicken broth. Add in garlic paste and salt if using. Stir well until smooth.
If using tadka seasoning blend, add it to the mixture and stir evenly.
Pour the mixture into a shallow baking dish or tin lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
